title: Your Details
description: This information will be used for payroll and taxes, so double-check that it's accurate.

homeAddress.title: Home address
homeAddress.description: Your home mailing address, within the United States.
homeAddress.courtesyWithholdingDescription: Withhold and pay local income taxes for employees who live and work in different states.

workAddress.title: Work address
workAddress.description: This is where you primarily work. We need this information to make sure your pay is accurate. Please reach out to your employer if this looks incorrect.

validations.INVALID_SSN_FORMAT: The SSN must be exactly 9 digits long, cannot contain all zeros in any group, and the first three digits cannot be '666' or in the range 900–999.
validations.INVALID_ZIP_FORMAT: Please provide a valid zip code
